summary: Tested Constellation-Linked Personalized Guided Meditations feature. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified. New Cosmic Meditations mode shows all 12 zodiac constellations with proper structure (name, figure, element, deity, theme, cosmic lesson). Duration selector shows 5, 8, 10, 15 min options with 10 min default. Generate buttons work. Previously built features (Guided, Build Your Own, Timer modes) still work. Avatar energy state panel regression passed.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user. Test user already has 2 saved constellation meditations (Taurus, Aries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Constellation-Linked Meditations feature fully implemented and tested. GET /api/meditation/constellation-themes returns 12 zodiac themes with all required fields. POST /api/meditation/generate-constellation generates AI meditations (takes 10-30 seconds). GET /api/meditation/my-constellation returns saved meditations. DELETE /api/meditation/constellation/{id} deletes meditations. Frontend Cosmic Meditations mode shows constellation cards grid with duration selector. Test user has 2 saved constellation meditations.

constellation_themes_structure.description: Each theme has id, name, symbol, element, color, deity, figure, theme, imagery, lesson, is_birth_sign, has_meditation

constellation_themes_all_zodiac_signs.description: All 12 zodiac signs present: aries, taurus, gemini, cancer, leo, virgo, libra, scorpio, sagittarius, capricorn, aquarius, pisces

constellation_themes_elements.description: Elements are Fire, Earth, Air, or Water

generate_constellation_accepts_valid_req.description: Accepts valid request with constellation_id and duration

my_constellation_returns_list.description: Returns a list of saved meditations

meditation_mode_toggle_shows_4_modes.description: Mode toggle shows Guided Meditations, Cosmic Meditations, Build Your Own, Timer Mode

cosmic_meditations_container.description: Clicking Cosmic Meditations shows constellation cards grid

constellation_card_content.description: Cards show name, figure, element, deity, theme, cosmic lesson, generate button

regression_guided_mode.description: Guided Meditations mode still works with 6 meditation cards

regression_build_mode.description: Build Your Own mode still works with intention input

regression_timer_mode.description: Timer Mode still works with toggle button

regression_avatar_energy_state.description: Avatar page energy state panel still working

api_verification.GET /api/meditation/constellation-themes: 200 OK - Returns {themes: [...12 zodiac themes...], user_zodiac: string|null}
api_verification.POST /api/meditation/generate-constellat: 200 OK - Generates AI meditation, returns {meditation: {...}, constellation: {...}}
api_verification.GET /api/meditation/my-constellation: 200 OK - Returns array of saved constellation meditations
